message:
feat(reflect): Add shouldExitEarly function for centralized iteration control

- Implement shouldExitEarly() function with 3 exit conditions:
  - No new deltas (LLM exhausted insights)
  - Max deltas (20) reached (diminishing returns)
  - Max iterations reached (hard limit)
- Refactor reflectOnSession() to use centralized logic
- Add comprehensive JSDoc documentation with examples
